items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of anomaly detection on API usage patterns, but there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this requirement is satisfied. The prior steps do not include any validations or checks related to anomaly detection, indicating a gap in the testing process. Without specific evidence or results from the simulation, it is impossible to determine if the expected outcome was achieved.
